creator: jsatkinson@embarqmail.com
text:
Jimmie James wrote:
> Joseph S. Atkinson wrote:
>> Sorry.
>>
>> I took over aqualung last month or so and just became aware of this PR 
>> today.
>>
>> If you update the the latest version, does this problem still exist?
>>
> 
> It's working once more, the last update seems to have fixed it.
> aqualung-0.9.b10
> 
> ~>aqualung --version
> aqualung main(): munlockall() failed
> Aqualung -- Music player for GNU/Linux
> Build version: R-1061
> (C) 2004-2009 Tom Szilagyi <tszilagyi@users.sourceforge.net>
> This is free software, and you are welcome to redistribute it
> under certain conditions; see the file COPYING for details.
> 
> This Aqualung binary is compiled with:
> 
>   Optional features:
>     [+] LADSPA plugin support
>     [ ] CDDA (Audio CD) support
>     [+] CDDB support
>     [+] Sample Rate Converter support
>     [ ] iRiver iFP driver support
>     [+] Loop playback support
>     [+] Systray support
>     [+] Podcast support
>     [ ] Lua (programmable title formatting) support
> 
>   Decoding support:
>     [+] sndfile (WAV, AIFF, etc.)
>     [+] Free Lossless Audio Codec (FLAC)
>     [+] Ogg Vorbis
>     [+] Ogg Speex
>     [+] MPEG Audio (MPEG 1-2.5 Layer I-III)
> 
>     [+] MOD Audio (MOD, S3M, XM, IT, etc.)
>     [+] Musepack
>     [+] Monkey's Audio Codec
>     [+] WavPack
>     [+] LAVC (AC3, AAC, WavPack, WMA, etc.)
> 
>   Encoding support:
>     [+] sndfile (WAV)
>     [+] Free Lossless Audio Codec (FLAC)
>     [+] Ogg Vorbis
>     [+] LAME (MP3)
> 
>   Output driver support:
>     [ ] sndio Audio
>     [+] OSS Audio
>     [ ] ALSA Audio
>     [+] JACK Audio Server
>     [ ] Win32 Sound API
> 

Thanks, sorry it took so long to get it resolved. I will have this closed.
